qa_pairs.question: When running Ansys simulations, which type of script is generally recommended for better performance: single node (SMP) or multinode (DMP)?
qa_pairs.answer: For Ansys simulations, single node (SMP Shared Memory Parallel) scripts typically perform better than multinode (DIS Distributed Memory Parallel) scripts and therefore should be used whenever possible.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommendation for Ansys module version compatibility with input files to avoid issues?
qa_pairs.answer: To help avoid compatibility issues, the Ansys module loaded in your script should ideally match the version used to generate the input file.
